meta.description: An input parameter for a Claude AI skill.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_8e3f09ce_89ab_4c64_b5d0_94ba4cd08046" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "required" BOOLEAN,
    "example" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_8e3f09ce_89ab_4c64_b5d0_94ba4cd08046" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_8e3f09ce89ab4c64_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
